narrative_beat: Anjos caidos em ouro-escuro e carmesim de baixo para cima

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid Watchers fallen angels in dark gold and crimson armor with black open wings of enormous scale descending from sky in formation seen dramatically from below in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the Watchers descending in formation with black wings and dark gold crimson armor
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated arid mountain range seen from below with grey monochromatic snowy peaks in background
props: Watcher fallen angels in dark gold and crimson

composition.foreground: Watchers in vivid dark gold crimson

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber-crimson highlights, anamorphic flare

mood.emotion: the fallen ones who brought forbidden knowledge — Genesis 6

symbolism.primary: the Watchers as the first external intelligence corrupting humanity
symbolism.secondary: same pattern: superior beings giving humanity tools beyond its moral capacity

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
